name: SORELLE
description:
Modern romance meets timeless craftsmanship in Sorelle, a beautifully coordinated two-piece Chantilly lace bridal set. Crafted in delicate ivory lace, the structured corset bodice features a contemporary cat- eye neckline that softly frames the décolletage. The elongated bodice ﬂows into an inverted basque waistline, sculpting the waist and creating a striking, architectural silhouette that feels both reﬁned and fashion-forward. At the back, a sleek zipper closure ensures a secure and seamless ﬁt.
The matching Chantilly lace skirt hugs the ﬁgure before gently ﬂaring into an elegant train, creating a ﬂattering ﬁt-and-ﬂare silhouette that moves with effortless grace. Designed with versatility in mind, Sorelle allows the bride to transform her look throughout the day — pair the corset bodice with the Sorelle Mini Skirt for a playful second look, perfect for your ﬁrst dance or after-party celebration.

name: SORELLE MINI
description:
Playful yet undeniably reﬁned, the Sorelle Mini set offers a modern bridal look designed for celebration. The structured corset bodice mirrors the signature design of the Sorelle gown, crafted in delicate Chantilly lace with a contemporary cat-eye neckline that beautifully frames the décolletage. The elongated bodice ﬂows into a ﬂattering inverted basque waistline, sculpting the waist and creating a striking, fashion-forward silhouette.
Paired with a matching mini skirt, the set introduces a fresh, fashion-forward take on classic bridal lace. The skirt is tailored in the same exquisite Chantilly lace and ﬁnished with a delicate scalloped hem, adding soft texture and romantic detail. Perfect for intimate ceremonies, receptions, or bridal after- parties, the Sorelle Mini Set is designed with versatility in mind — with the bodice and skirt also available separately, allowing brides to mix and match to create their own unique bridal looks.

name: SOLSTICE
description:
Understated yet captivating, Solstice is a modern ﬁt-and-ﬂare gown designed for the bride who loves reﬁned simplicity with thoughtful detail. Crafted from buttery soft crepe, the gown drapes beautifully over the body, offering both luxurious comfort and a sleek, sculpted silhouette. The softly draped cowl neckline creates an effortless elegance, supported by delicate pearl-adorned straps that add a subtle touch of romance.
From the back, Solstice reveals a striking low V-back framed with the same pearl detailing, while elegant ruching draws the eye and enhances the natural shape of the ﬁgure. From the base of the V-back, a single godet unfolds seamlessly into the train, adding graceful movement and subtle dimension as the gown ﬂows behind the bride.

name: SOLEIL
description:
Radiant and undeniably regal, Soleil is a modern strapless ballgown designed to captivate from the very ﬁrst moment. Crafted from luxurious ivory mikado, the structured bodice features a contemporary cat- eye neckline and sculpted boning that beautifully supports and deﬁnes the waist. A corset lace-up back enhances the ﬁt, gently cinching the silhouette to ﬂatter the bride’s natural curves.
The drop-waist design elongates the torso before ﬂowing into a dramatic ballgown skirt, where the fabric blooms from the hips and into an elegant cathedral train. Striking the perfect balance between modern sophistication and classic grandeur, Soleil is made for the bride who desires a look that feels both bold and effortlessly graceful.

name: LUCIA
description: Lucia is the embodiment of effortless grace and bold elegance, a dress made for the woman who seeks to make a statement while revelling in the beauty of soft, romantic details. Crafted from luxurious satin, this strapless ballgown embraces your form with off-shoulder sleeves that gently caress the shoulders. The voluminous A-line skirt flows beautifully, revealing a daring thigh-high split that adds a modern twist to this timeless silhouette. With Lucia, every movement is a dance of refinement and confidence, creating a bridal look that’s as enchanting as it is unforgettable.

name: SLOANE
description:
Sleek, reﬁned, and effortlessly modern, Sloane is a sculpted ﬁt-and-ﬂare gown designed to celebrate clean lines and timeless sophistication. Crafted from buttery soft, luxurious crepe, the gown offers both comfort and structure, beautifully contouring the body while maintaining an elegant, ﬂuid feel. The structured bodice features a reﬁned square neckline framed by delicate straps, providing ﬂattering support that extends into a softly deﬁned basque waistline.
Subtle ruching at the front hips adds a touch of texture and gentle shaping, enhancing the natural curves before the silhouette ﬂows into a graceful ﬁt-and-ﬂare skirt. At the back, a row of delicate buttons begins at the zipper and continues all the way to the end of the train, creating a classic bridal ﬁnish that feels both polished and romantic. Minimal yet striking, Sloane is the perfect gown for the bride who appreciates understated beauty and modern elegance.

name: SERAPHINE
description:
Ethereal yet striking, Seraphine is a romantic lace ball gown designed for the bride who desires softness with structure. The sheer corset bodice features a plunging illusion sweetheart neckline and a beautifully sculpted basque waistline, creating a ﬂattering, elongated silhouette. Delicate lace embroidery adorns the bodice, allowing the intricate ﬂoral details to take center stage while highlighting the artistry of the design.
Flowing from the waist, the voluminous skirt forms a lightweight ball gown silhouette, crafted from layers of lace that move with effortless grace. The gown feels airy and romantic while maintaining a beautifully structured shape, creating a look that is both modern and timeless. Seraphine also features matching detachable pleated lace off-shoulder straps, allowing the bride to effortlessly transform the look while adding a soft, romantic touch to the neckline.

name: SELENE
description:
Graceful and reﬁned, Selene is a strapless A-line ballgown that captures the beauty of modern structure and timeless simplicity. Crafted from luxurious soft mikado, the gown features a corset-style bodice with contemporary ruched panels across the bust, complemented by exposed boning that sculpts and supports the silhouette. A ﬂattering basque waistline enhances the natural shape of the waist, creating an elegant, architectural look inspired by the quiet grandeur of European design.
At the back, a row of delicate buttons traces the zipper closure, adding a classic bridal detail. The full A- line skirt ﬂows effortlessly from the structured bodice, creating soft volume and movement while discreetly concealing hidden pockets — a modern bride’s must-have. Sophisticated yet effortlessly wearable, Selene is a gown that balances striking structure with graceful simplicity.

name: SASKIA
description:
Reﬁned, romantic, and effortlessly versatile, Saskia is a beautifully crafted two-piece gown designed for the bride who loves both structure and softness. The bodice is made from luxurious mikado, sculpted into a ﬂattering strapless corset silhouette that cinches the waist and enhances the ﬁgure. Delicate Chantilly lace draping is softly ruched across the bust, extending into detachable off-shoulder strapsthat frame the neckline and gracefully highlight the décolletage and collarbone. At the back, a sleek zipper closure is ﬁnished with a row of elegant buttons for a timeless bridal touch.
Paired with a ﬁtted Chantilly lace skirt, Saskia creates a silhouette that is both feminine and striking. Gentle ruching at the hip adds texture and dimension before the ﬁt-and-ﬂare design ﬂows into a graceful train. The blend of structured mikado and delicate lace creates a look that feels modern yet romantic, while the detachable straps and the two-piece design offers the freedom to mix-and-match and transform your gown to into multiple bridal looks for your special day.

name: SAPPHIRA
description:
Light, airy, and effortlessly graceful, Sapphira is a gown designed to move with quiet beauty. Crafted from luxurious ivory organza, this romantic A-line silhouette feels soft and weightless, creating a dreamy sense of movement with every step. The structured bodice features delicate ruching that complements the modern straight neckline, offering a ﬂattering balance of softness and structure.
At the back, a subtle V-back is ﬁnished with a zipper closure adorned with elegant buttons, adding a classic bridal touch. Detachable shoulder straps allow the bride to transform the look with ease — wear them for a softly romantic feel or remove them for a clean, contemporary neckline. Flowing into a light, airy organza skirt, Sapphira drifts beautifully into a graceful train, capturing the essence of effortless bridal elegance.

name: SAGE
description:
Romantic, sculpted, and effortlessly graceful, Sage is a Chantilly lace gown designed to celebrate feminine beauty. The strapless silhouette features a sheer corset bodice where delicate ﬂoral Chantilly lace is brought to life, framed by a softly contoured neckline and a ﬂattering basque waistline that beautifully deﬁnes the waist. The intricate lacework creates a sense of lightness while highlighting the artistry of the design.
The ﬁtted silhouette gently hugs the body before ﬂaring into a graceful train, ﬁnished with a delicate scalloped lace edge that trails beautifully behind the bride. Detachable long lace sleeves offer the versatility to transform the look — adding an extra layer of romance and elegance for the ceremony, while allowing for a more modern strapless style throughout the celebration.

name: SAFFRON
description:
Reﬁned, graceful, and quietly striking, Saffron is a modern princess-style gown designed to celebrate effortless elegance. Inspired by the beloved square neckline of our Michaela gown, this design reimagines the silhouette with clean structure and timeless sophistication. Crafted from luxurious ivory brocade, the fabric reveals subtle woven ﬂoral details that add depth and texture while maintaining a beautifully understated ﬁnish.
The structured square neckline is framed by delicate straps and complemented by a striking open back, creating a balanced look that feels both modern and classic. Sculpted seams contour the bodice before ﬂowing seamlessly into a full skirt, forming a princess-cut silhouette with graceful volume and movement. Elegant yet refreshingly contemporary, Saffron is a gown that captures the beauty of reﬁned bridal style.

name: SABINE
description:
Romantic with a touch of modern allure, Sabine is a ﬁtted Chantilly lace gown designed to beautifully contour the bride’s silhouette. The strapless bodice features a sheer corset construction with a plunging V-neckline, delicately framed with Chantilly eyelash lace and soft ﬂoral lace motifs that gently trace the edges, creating a look that feels both reﬁned and feminine.
At the back, the bodice is secured with a soft tulle lace-up ribbon, adding a romantic detail while allowing for an adjustable ﬁt. The ﬁt-and-ﬂare lace skirt ﬂows effortlessly into a modest court-length train, offering graceful movement that is perfect for outdoor celebrations or brides who want elegance with ease. Paired with a matching lace scarf, Sabine can be styled to add an extra layer of modern sophistication to this beautifully timeless design.

name: LEIGHTON
description: Since its debut, Leighton has remained a bride favourite, embodying the signature Miss Scarlett crepe silhouette with effortless grace. The gown’s elegant neckline is adorned with soft, draped chiffon that cascades over the arms, creating delicate off-shoulder straps. A row of buttons trails down the back, extending to the very tip of the train—a detail brides adore and one of our most requested signature touches. Timeless, romantic, and endlessly flattering, Leighton is a gown that continues to captivate.

name: LEONA
description: Leona is the epitome of understated elegance and modern romance. With a modest V-neckline and delicate pleating across the front bodice, this gown flatters every curve with a soft, refined structure. The flattering V-back adds an extra touch of allure, leaving a lasting impression from every angle. Made from luxurious silky satin, the fabric drapes gracefully into a sleek, sophisticated silhouette, creating an effortlessly timeless bridal look. Leona is perfect for the bride who desires both elegance and comfort on her special day.

name: LUNA
description: Luna is a vision of ethereal romance. With its strapless design and asymmetrical off-shoulder straps, it delicately wraps you in timeless elegance, while the beaded detail along the bodice adds an exquisite touch of sophistication. Crafted from our signature crepe fabric, the flowing skirt moves with you, creating a soft, dreamlike silhouette. The contrast of the delicate organza bodice perfectly complements the crepe skirt, while the beaded neckline catches the light, shimmering as you make your way toward forever. Luna is for the bride who dares to dream—radiant, confident, and effortlessly graceful.

name: LEXI
description: Lexi is the definition of modern elegance, designed for the bride who radiates effortless beauty and confidence. Inspired by the beloved Michaela design, it features a striking square neckline that balances sophistication with a touch of romance. The stunning low back adds an unexpected and alluring detail, while the detachable bow offers a whimsical, customisable touch, allowing you to create the perfect look for your special day. This crepe gown captures the essence of contemporary bridal glamour with its timeless structure and delicate design details. Whether you're walking down the aisle or dancing the night away, Lexi exudes a perfect blend of strength and grace, ensuring you feel as unforgettable as your wedding day itself.

name: LAUREL
description: Laurel embodies timeless beauty, effortlessly blending modern romance with classic grace. The luxurious silky satin fabric drapes beautifully, catching the light with every movement. The delicate twist detail across the neckline adds a touch of intrigue, perfectly complementing the soft, flowing A-line skirt that moves with gentle elegance. With sheer long sleeves for an added delicate and soft feature, Laurel captures the essence of refined romance. It’s a gown that speaks to the heart, enveloping the bride in a sense of softness and confidence, creating a perfect moment for her special day.

name: LIANA
description: Crafted from luxurious satin, Liana is a vision of modern elegance. Its sculpted mermaid silhouette is enhanced by delicate ruched panels that wrap across the bodice, drawing the eye to a refined sweetheart neckline. For a touch of grandeur, the detachable overskirt cascades into a sweeping cathedral train—capturing the essence of a fairytale moment. Remove the overskirt for a sleek, minimalist second look, perfect for celebrating into the night.

name: LILY
description: Lily captures the essence of a whimsical dream, where youthful elegance meets the delicate grace of ballet. With its elegant sweetheart neckline and perfectly fitted bodice, this mini dress embraces refined simplicity, while the voluminous tulle skirt adds a playful touch that sways with every step. Designed for the modern bride, Lily is the dress that lets you shine as you move. Whether it’s your engagement, bridal shower or the reception after party, let Lily be the dress that carries you through your unforgettable day with grace and joy.

name: LUCY
description: Lucy is the epitome of modern bridal with a whisper of allure. Crafted from our signature crepe fabric, this one-shoulder gown embodies effortless sophistication. A bold, yet delicate cut-out panel, sealed with sheer nude tulle, adds a touch of unexpected sensuality. Every line and curve of the dress exudes confidence and grace, highlighting the natural beauty of the bride. Lucy is for the bride who dares to dream, who walks toward her future with poise and passion, leaving behind a trail of elegance and unforgettable memories.

name: LEILA
description: Leila, a well-loved silhouette is crafted in our signature crepe fabric. Designed for the modern bride with a fairytale vision, Leila showcases a fitted bodice with a flattering V-neckline, flowing into a classic A-line skirt and cathedral train. A subtle high leg split adds a contemporary edge—but for a more traditional look, it’s entirely optional. She is the perfect blend of modern and classic bridal beauty.

name: ELLE
description: Elle is a playful yet elegant mini crafted from luxurious silky satin. With a sweetheart neckline and a figure-skimming silhouette, it offers a perfect balance of chic sophistication and youthful charm. The detachable sheer long sleeves add an ethereal touch, while the off-shoulder straps provide a more daring look, giving you the freedom to choose your style. A modern take on timeless beauty, Elle is designed for the bride who wants to combine comfort, versatility, and romance. Whether for vows or the first dance, this dress lets you express your individuality with effortless grace.

name: EVERLY
description: Everly is the perfect blend of modern sophistication and timeless elegance.Crafted from our luxurious silky satin, she drapes beautifully into a soft A-line silhouette with a gentle puddle train. The plunging V-neckline and delicate ruched bodice create a romantic, flawless fit, while a high leg split adds a touch of playful allure. Designed for the bride who embraces both grace and modern charm, Everly is the epitome of understated elegance.

name: ESTELLE
description: Estelle brings modern sophistication and timeless style. Crafted from our luxurious silky satin fabric, this gown embraces a strapless and plunging neckline, combined with an elegant silhouette. Estelle is a celebration of understated luxury, designed for the bride who seeks both comfort and stunning simplicity on her special day.

name: ELORA
description: Elora captures the essence of serene beauty and quiet sophistication. With its romantic sweetheart neckline and delicate straps, this gown effortlessly embraces the natural grace of the bride. The luxurious silky satin flows gently into a soft A-line skirt, creating a fluid silhouette that moves with every step. A dress for the bride who dreams of timeless romance, Elora invites you to feel both graceful and at ease on your most cherished day.

name: ELLIOT
description: Elliot is the perfect balance of comfort and sophistication, crafted from our signature crepe for a flawless fit-and-flare silhouette. The off-shoulder neckline and scooped back exude timeless elegance, while the detachable crepe long sleeves offer a versatile second bridal look. A wrapped-style skirt drapes beautifully, leading to an open high split—showcasing your perfect bridal heels with effortless style. Elliot is the gown that brings together modern bridal and classic grace.

name: EZRA
description: Ezra is the perfect blend of modern sophistication and timeless elegance. Crafted from lustrous satin, this ballgown features a simple yet refined strapless bodice that enhances its effortless beauty. The smooth, lustrous satin fabric falls into a graceful A-line skirt silhouette, while the hidden pockets offer a touch of practicality. Designed with both elegance and comfort in mind, Ezra provides a modern, simplistic bridal look that stands the test of time. Ideal for the bride who values understated beauty and refined simplicity, this gown is both luxurious and versatile.

name: EVE
description: Eve is a vision of contemporary sophistication, crafted to embrace the modern bride with a design that exudes both elegance and effortless beauty. The strapless silhouette, paired with an asymmetrical neckline, creates a stunningly graceful profile. The pleated detailing across the dress beautifully shapes the figure, while the delicate beaded lace panel in the skirt adds an element of intricate texture and refinement. Eve offers the perfect balance of simplicity and sophistication, making it a timeless choice for a bride seeking understated yet unforgettable bridal style.

name: EMBER
description: The Ember gown exudes modern elegance with its striking halter neck design, crafted from our luxurious silky satin fabric. The dress drapes beautifully over the figure, highlighting a sleek silhouette, while the detachable sheer tulle long sleeves add a graceful, ethereal touch. Finished with a small puddle train, Ember is the perfect choice for that second look or first dance, offering both sophistication and versatility for the bride who wants to make a memorable impression.

name: EDEN
description: Eden is the embodiment of ethereal beauty and effortless elegance. Crafted from delicate organza, this two-piece gown features a fitted bandeau bodice with a subtle invisible button enclosure that enhances its sleek, minimalist charm. The A-line skirt flows with lightness and grace, creating a sense of movement as it cascades to the floor. Designed for the bride who dreams of a soft, romantic look, Eden is a perfect balance of refined simplicity and breath-taking allure. The light, airy fabric ensures that every step feels like floating on air, making this gown an unforgettable choice for a modern, carefree celebration of love.

name: ELIZABETH
description: Elizabeth is a masterpiece of modern bridal design, crafted from luxurious satin that effortlessly exudes sophistication. The form-flattering and structured bodice enhances the bride’s figure, while the draped A-line skirt gracefully flows into a daring thigh-high slit. The thin shoulder straps add a touch of delicacy to the bold design, creating a perfect balance of classic beauty with contemporary flair. For the bride who seeks a refined, fashion-forward look on her special day, Elizabeth makes a statement of both confidence and allure.

name: ELSIE
description: Elsie is a vision of elegance, effortlessly blending timeless beauty with modern sophistication. Crafted from luxurious chiffon silk, this gown flows with a soft, ethereal grace, capturing the essence of lightness and romance. The modern cat-eye neckline and delicately draped skirt create a flattering silhouette, while the thigh-high slit adds a touch of daring allure. Perfect for the bride who desires both refined elegance and a touch of the unexpected, Elsie is designed to make a statement on your special day.

name: ESTHER
description: A vision of modern luxury, Esther is crafted from our signature crepe in a soft mermaid silhouette that effortlessly flatters. The sleek square neckline and supportive crepe shoulder straps offer both structure and comfort, while detachable tulle wings provide a romantic alternative to a traditional veil. Whether worn with or without the wings, Esther is designed for the bride who seeks timeless beauty with a contemporary edge.

name: TATUM
description: Tatum is an exquisite bridal gown made from fully beaded lace, adorned with elegant pearls that add a soft, romantic touch. The strapless, structured bodice offers a beautifully supportive fit, while the gown's silhouette gently hugs the figure before flowing into a graceful, fitted skirt. The lustrous pearls create a refined, understated shimmer that adds a touch of timeless sophistication. Tatum is the perfect choice for a bride who wants a classic, yet modern look—ideal for making a statement with effortless elegance.

name: ESTELLE 2.0
description: Estelle 2.0 brings modern sophistication and timeless style. Crafted in our signature crepe fabric, this gown embraces a strapless and plunging neckline, combined with an elegant silhouette. Finished with delicate button detailing along the back, Estelle 2.0 is a celebration of understated luxury, designed for the bride who seeks both comfort and unforgettable style on her special day.

name: MICHAELA
description: A timeless classic, Michaela has remained a bridal favourite for a reason. Designed in our signature crepe, its sculpting silhouette and elegant square neckline create a look that is effortlessly refined. Flattering, sophisticated, and endlessly timeless, Michaela is the gown that proves simplicity is the ultimate statement.

name: LIANA
description: Crafted from luxurious satin, Liana is a vision of modern elegance. Its sculpted mermaid silhouette is enhanced by delicate ruched panels that wrap across the bodice, drawing the eye to a refined sweetheart neckline. For a touch of grandeur, the detachable overskirt cascades into a sweeping cathedral train—capturing the essence of a fairytale moment. Remove the overskirt for a sleek, minimalist second look, perfect for celebrating into the night.

name: LEILA 2.0
description: A timeless favourite, now refined to perfection. Due to popular demand, Leila 2.0 is now crafted in our luxurious satin fabric and features hidden pockets for an effortlessly chic and functional touch. Designed for the modern bride with a fairytale vision, Leila 2.0 showcases a fitted bodice with a flattering V-neckline, flowing into a classic A-line skirt and cathedral train. A subtle high leg split adds a contemporary edge—but for a more traditional look, it’s entirely optional. With Leila 2.0, elegance is always your choice.

name: LEIGHTON
description: Since its debut, Leighton has remained a bride favourite, embodying the signature Miss Scarlett crepe silhouette with effortless grace. The gown’s elegant neckline is adorned with soft, draped chiffon that cascades over the arms, creating delicate off-shoulder straps. A row of buttons trails down the back, extending to the very tip of the train—a detail brides adore and one of our most requested signature touches. Timeless, romantic, and endlessly flattering, Leighton is a gown that continues to captivate.

name: EVERLY
description: Everly is the perfect blend of modern sophistication and timeless elegance.Crafted from our luxurious silky satin, she drapes beautifully into a soft A-line silhouette with a gentle puddle train. The plunging V-neckline and delicate ruched bodice create a romantic, flawless fit, while a high leg split adds a touch of playful allure. Designed for the bride who embraces both grace and modern charm, Everly is the epitome of understated elegance. (Acacia satin neck scarf is sold separately.)

name: ESTHER
description: A vision of modern luxury, Esther is crafted from our signature crepe in a soft mermaid silhouette that effortlessly flatters. The sleek square neckline and supportive crepe shoulder straps offer both structure and comfort, while detachable tulle wings provide a romantic alternative to a traditional veil. Whether worn with or without the wings, Esther is designed for the bride who seeks timeless beauty with a contemporary edge. (Acacia satin neck scarf is sold separately.)

name: ELLIOT
description: Elliot is the perfect balance of comfort and sophistication, crafted from our signature crepe for a flawless fit-and-flare silhouette. The off-shoulder neckline and scooped back exude timeless elegance, while the detachable crepe long sleeves offer a versatile second bridal look. A wrapped-style skirt drapes beautifully, leading to an open high split—showcasing your perfect bridal heels with effortless style. Elliot is the gown that brings together modern bridal and classic grace.

name: ANNA
description: The Anna gown radiates elegance in every detail. Adorned with delicate beading and intricate lace, it’s designed to enhance the natural beauty of every bride. With its graceful silhouette and flattering sweetheart neckline, Anna ensures you make a breathtaking entrance, leaving a lasting impression in any room.

name: AMIRA
description: A true bridal favourite, Amira exudes understated elegance and romance with her beautifully draped off-shoulder neckline, perfectly framing the décolletage. Crafted from our luxurious signature crepe, this bestselling gown is tailored in a relaxed mermaid silhouette—designed to move effortlessly with you, offering both style and comfort from the first step down the aisle to the last dance of the night. (Chiffon neck scarf is sold separately.)

name: AMELIE 2.0
description: Make a statement with Amelie 2.0 – a bold and sophisticated design that embodies both confidence and playfulness. The stunning back detailing extends beautifully into the train, creating a captivating focal point, while the lace off-shoulder straps perfectly frame the neckline. The gown hugs the body in all the right places, accentuating every curve with grace and elegance. Amelie 2.0 is for the bride who knows how to make an entrance and celebrate her own version of modern luxury.

name: TOVE
description: Tove is the perfect fusion of modern sophistication and timeless romance. This two-piece design features a beautifully structured mikado bodice with a lace-up back, offering both support and a flattering silhouette. The clean, tailored lines of the mikado fabric are complemented by a sleek, form-fitting skirt that enhances the bride’s natural curves. Tove is ideal for the bride who seeks elegance with a bold statement, offering both the freedom to move and the grace to shine — a stunning choice for a truly unforgettable day.

name: TORY
description: Tory, designed for the bride who commands attention and radiates grace, is crafted from a luxurious brocade fabric. It features an exquisite floral texture all over that adds depth and dimension, subtly catching the light with every movement. The strapless, fitted gown sculpts the figure beautifully, while the dramatic train creates a stunning silhouette. With its sophisticated fit and clean lines, Tory is the epitome of modern elegance.

name: TILLY
description: Tilly is the definition of timeless elegance and modern romance. Crafted from luxurious silky satin, this strapless gown gently drapes over the body, with beautiful ruched detailing across the front of the skirt, adding a soft, flattering feature. The sweetheart neckline is delicately framed by a romantic lace trim, while the basque waistline enhances the figure. Tilly is for the bride who seeks effortless beauty and refined luxury for her special day.

name: TIANA
description: Tiana is the ultimate princess ballgown, designed to make every bride feel like she’s stepped into a fairytale. Crafted from luxurious dove satin, this voluminous ballgown skirt swirls with elegance, giving the bride that magical moment of grace and grandeur. The fitted corset bodice, adorned with stunning beaded detailing, adds glamour and sophistication. With its intricate lace accents and dramatic back, Tiana is the perfect blend of romance and opulence, ensuring the bride feels both regal and radiant on her special day.

name: THEA
description: The Thea gown is a modern masterpiece, crafted from luxurious Mikado fabric. Its graceful off-the-shoulder neckline and structured bodice create a refined, flattering silhouette that flows into a stunning grand train. For the bride seeking a balance of drama and elegance, Thea delivers a timeless, captivating look that offers a modern twist on the classic bridal silhouette. Perfect for the bride who wants to make a grand entrance with effortless grace.

name: TESSA
description: Tessa is classic beauty and modern sophistication at its finest. This strapless gown, crafted from our signature crepe fabric, gently hugs the body, creating a sleek, flattering silhouette. The detachable lace and beaded long sleeves add a touch of opulence and versatility, allowing the bride to transform her look effortlessly. Ideal for the bride who desires a glamourous and timeless bridal look.

name: TEGAN
description: Tegan exudes modern sophistication with an added touch of classic romance. The strapless design is elevated by a structured bodice and basque waist that sculpts the silhouette beautifully. A delicate lace trim along the cat-eye neckline adds a subtle yet striking detail, enhancing the gown’s timeless elegance. The ruched and draped detailing on the skirt creates a flattering feautre. Wear the gown with its detachable lace long sleeves to transform this bridal look from sleek and refined to effortlessly elegant. Tegan is a stunning choice for the bride who desires both style and comfort, with a gown that can be tailored to reflect her unique vision.

name: TATE
description: Tate is what modern romance is all about. Crafted from luxurious silky satin, this multi-look bridal gown features a flattering, sleek silhouette with a captivating cat-eye neckline and a soft scooped back that beautifully enhances the figure. A dramatic side slit adds a touch of sensuality, while the detachable long satin sleeves offer versatility and sophistication. The delicate button detail along the back completes the gown’s seamless, graceful finish. Tate is designed for the bride who craves both style and versatility, making a statement of refined glamour on her wedding day. (Acacia satin scarf is sold separately.)

name: TALLULAH
description: Introducing Tallulah, a refined reimagining of our beloved Michaela gown. This stunning dress retains the bestselling square neckline and sleek, feminine silhouette of its predecessor, now elevated with the addition of exquisite Chantilly lace that drapes elegantly over the entire gown. The intricate lace detail adds a soft, romantic texture, creating a beautifully timeless look with a modern twist. Perfect for the bride who desires both classic charm and sophisticated design, Tallulah is a celebration of timeless beauty, now more enchanting than ever.

name: TALIA
description: Talia is the definition of effortless elegance, combining a modern V-neckline with our signature crepe fabric to create a flattering silhouette that effortlessly moves with every step. The clean lines of this gown gently contour the body, showcasing the sleek beauty of its simple yet stunning design. With a low, graceful back and delicate button details, Talia embodies modern sophistication, offering a refined look for the bride who values both style and comfort. Perfect for the contemporary bride, this gown is made to turn heads while exuding understated charm.

name: TALEEN
description: Introducing Taleen – a masterpiece of modern luxury. Featuring a sleek, strapless bodice with sculptural draping, this gown exudes refined elegance. The detachable voluminous train adds dramatic flair for the ceremony, creating a breathtaking moment as it cascades behind. Once removed, Taleen transforms into a chic sheath silhouette, offering freedom and ease for the bride to dance the night away in style. A versatile and stunning design, perfect for the bride who desires both grandeur and comfort on her special day.
